name: CLX - MGA Insurance Claim Review v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. advisor or client session. Logs a claim filed by client → creates a high-priority policy_reviews row (review_type='claim'), triggers claim-filed video template, notifies advisor immediately.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const rows = $input.item.json; const p = (Array.isArray(rows) ? rows[0] : rows) || {}; const ctx = $('Carry').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', policy_application_id: ctx.policy_application_id, client_id: p.client_id, advisor_id: p.advisor_id, review_type: 'claim', trigger_source: 'client_request', trigger_signal_type: 'claim_filed', scheduled_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), due_date: new Date(Date.now() + 2*86400000).toISOString().slice(0,10), priority: 'urgent', status: 'scheduled', client_situation_changes: { claim_description: ctx.claim_description, claim_amount_estimate: ctx.claim_amount_estimate, incident_date: ctx.incident_date }, video_engagement_status: 'not_sent' }); })() }}

={{ (() => { const ins = $input.item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; if (!row || !row.id) return JSON.stringify({ skip: true }); return JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, policy_review_id: row.id }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'claim_filed', policy_application_id: $('Carry').item.json.policy_application_id, performed_by_user_id: $('Carry').item.json.reporter_user_id, performed_by_role: $('Carry').item.json.reporter_role, event_data: { description: $('Carry').item.json.claim_description, amount_estimate_cents: $('Carry').item.json.claim_amount_estimate, incident_date: $('Carry').item.json.incident_date }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Create Claim Review').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', policy_review_id: row && row.id, priority: 'urgent' }); })() }}
